demo.title: capacitr.sh
demo.code:
# Preflight — current prices, accepted assets, EIP-712 domain hints
bankr prompt "Using the capacitr skill, run discovery"

# Discover markets from a URL — pays in $CAPACITR by default
bankr prompt "Using the capacitr skill, what are the trades around https://example.com/article"

# Free-text query — falls back to USDC if wallet has no $CAPACITR
bankr prompt "Using the capacitr skill, find markets for the oil narrative"

# Pre-signed header path (for platforms that don't auto-sign)
X_PAYMENT=<base64> ./scripts/analyze.sh "oil"

setup: Requires a Base mainnet wallet (chain ID `8453`) that can sign EIP-712 typed data — Bankr platform, Coinbase x402 SDK, Privy, MetaMask Delegation Toolkit, or vanilla viem/ethers all work
Optional: hold `$CAPACITR` for the cheaper default settlement path; otherwise USDC fallback is signed automatically
